name: UFO Kids' Nightlight - Pillowfort™
description: Cast a soothing glow in your kid's space with the UFO Nightlight from Pillowfort™. This LED ceramic nightlight features a UFO shape in white for a fun, out-of-this-world look. Designed with a non-removable integrated LED bulb, this electric nightlight comes with a one-way light setting for easy operation. Place it near their bedside or on the study table for a lovely glow.
